name: Google Chrome DLL Sideloading
notes:
This rule detects DLL sideloading in Google Chrome.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Wietze Beukema (project and research)
SIGMA Title: Potential Chrome Frame Helper DLL Sideloading
SIGMA Description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "chrome_frame_helper.dll"


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of chrome_frame_helper.dll
when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of [C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application or C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application]
when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of \AppData\local\Google\Chrome\Application
TD_list: APPLY Google Chrome DLL Sideloading on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of chrome_frame_helper.dll
AND NOT when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of [C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application or C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application]
AND NOT when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of \AppData\local\Google\Chrome\Application
RED_list: Event name: Google Chrome DLL Sideloading
Event description: Detects DLL sideloading in Google Chrome
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
